target:
Wow… Shinpei…
You've grown so much…
Alain, you've gotten a bit thinner...
We can catch up later... Go see Ushio.
(It really is the same. On the ferry earlier, and with Mio's bicycle too...)
(Everyone's moving and talking the same way as in my dream…)
(This isn't just deja vu or a prophetic dream... It's not on that level.)
(If the exact same things keep repeating like this...)
(Doesn't that mean... that shadow really exists?)
(...Those who see the shadow will die.)
(Was Ushio killed by a shadow!? And Mio too...)
Are you okay? Your face is completely pale...
Sorry... I'm gonna go get some fresh air...
(The bicycle Mio fell into the sea with... its brakes were broken...)
(There was a mark on the brake wire like it had been cut, wasn't there.)
(What if that was a trap meant to kill someone... meant to kill Mio?)
(Dammit... I don't understand any of this... I can't look at the big picture with this!)
(I feel like I'm gonna throw up...)
(Did I just hear something coming from the house...?)
(Mio...!? Why is she wearing her uniform...)
(Wh... what is that... The shadow is getting up...!!)
From now on, you are the local police officer, Tetsu Totsumura.
Hmm... Ah, I am Tetsu Totsumura... 34 years old...
What...? What was that just now!?
That's no good, Shinpei-kun. Since when were you here?
Alright, capture complete. Mio-cha~n, take care of this one too.
Aren't you working me too hard? You should just do it yourself.
Eavesdropping is a no-no, Shinpei-ku~n. That's a death sentence!
(This blood... is mine...? It's so red.)
I'll take that girl to Mother. She's a cute girl, so she might be happy.
